toscutil 2.13.0

CLAUDE.md

Source: CLAUDE.md

Guidance for Claude Code and other contributors working in this repository.

Project

toscutil is an R package providing utility functions (see DESCRIPTION and README.md). Source lives in R/, tests in tests/testthat, generated docs in man/.

Contributing & workflow

See CONTRIBUTING.md for the full contribution workflow, including:

  • Making edits — the devtools::document() / test() / check() checks to run after any change.
  • Tagging and GitHub releases — every Version bump in DESCRIPTION must be marked with an annotated vX.Y.Z git tag and a GitHub release whose notes come from the matching NEWS.md section. This is manual; no GitHub Action creates tags or releases.
  • Releasing to CRAN — the final checks and submission steps.

Conventions

  • Bump the Version field in DESCRIPTION and add a matching # toscutil vX.Y.Z section to NEWS.md for every user-facing change.
  • Keep generated man/*.Rd in sync by running devtools::document() after changing roxygen comments in R/.

On this page
